name: HRC_SEM_EDUCATIONS
description: This table contains education information for the person.

columns.Name: EDUCATION_ID
columns.Comments: This is the primary key of table education.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: This is the foreign key to person table.

columns.Name: DEGREE_LEVEL
columns.Comments: This is the education level of the person.

columns.Name: FIELD_OF_STUDY
columns.Comments: This is the field study of the person.

columns.Name: INSTITUTION_NAME
columns.Comments: This column contains the institution name.

columns.Name: INSTITUTION_CITY
columns.Comments: This column contains the institution city.

columns.Name: INSTITUTION_STATE
columns.Comments: This column contains the institution state.

columns.Name: INSTITUTION_COUNTRY
columns.Comments: This column contains the instituion country.

columns.Name: SCHOOL
columns.Comments: This is the school of the person.

columns.Name: START_DATE
columns.Comments: This column describes the end date of the education.

columns.Name: END_DATE
columns.Comments: This column describes the end date of the education.

columns.Name: CURRENT_EDUCATION
columns.Comments: This column indicates if education is current.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
